description: Historical task-prefix compatibility fixture. Current task results carry lifecycle in ToolMessage.additional_kwargs.subagent_status and preserve successful worker content unchanged; both sides still parse old stored messages consistently.

cases.name: succeeded
cases.content: Task Succeeded. Result: investigated and produced a 3-page report

cases.name: succeeded_with_runtime_observed_evidence
cases.origin: legacy succeeded message with runtime-observed tool evidence
cases.content:
Task Succeeded. Runtime-observed evidence:
- tool: write_file; path: /mnt/user-data/outputs/evidence.txt; status: success; output_sha256: abc
Result: wrote evidence

cases.name: failed
cases.content: Task failed. Error: underlying tool raised RuntimeError

cases.name: polling_timed_out
cases.content: Task polling timed out after 15 minutes. This may indicate the background task is stuck. Status: RUNNING

cases.name: polling_timed_out_other_n
cases.content: Task polling timed out after 1 minutes. Status: RUNNING

cases.name: pre_unknown_subagent
cases.origin: legacy pre-execution compatibility message (unknown subagent type; not emitted by current one-shot task_tool)
cases.content: Error: Unknown subagent type 'foo'. Available: bash, general-purpose

cases.name: pre_bash_disabled
cases.origin: legacy pre-execution compatibility message (host bash disabled; not emitted by current one-shot task_tool)
cases.content: Error: Host bash subagent is disabled by configuration

cases.name: pre_task_disappeared
cases.origin: legacy polling compatibility message (background task disappeared; not emitted by current one-shot task_tool)
cases.content: Error: Task 1234 disappeared from background tasks

cases.name: wrapper_error
cases.content: Error: Tool 'task' failed with TypeError: 'AsyncCallbackManager' object is not iterable. Continue with available context, or choose an alternative tool.
